NTU Information Management + Trans-disciplinary Bachelor Degree.

00 · Summary

B.S. student in Information Management and the Trans-disciplinary Bachelor Program at NTU. I approach problems at the intersection of software, data, and business.

I specialize in full-stack development (Next.js / React / TypeScript) and apply AI/ML pragmatically — RAG, experimentation, and pricing. I also care about design; photography and UI/UX shape how I build fast, usable products.

01 · Experience

ABConvert — Startup Generalist Intern

Shopify A/B Testing SaaS

2025
  • Built an A/B Price Testing Tool (Next.js 15, TypeScript, Recharts) with dual-slider UI and CSV ingestion.
  • Prototyped pricing elasticity modeling (triggered analysis, CUPED) to reduce required sample size.
  • Implemented always-valid monitoring and guardrails for trustworthy experiment decisions.
02 · Education

National Taiwan University

B.B.S. in Information Management · Double Major: Trans-disciplinary Bachelor Degree Program

2024–2028
